title: Beehiiv vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Moosend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool wins for newsletters vs automation.
h1: Beehiiv vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Beehiiv and Moosend offer freemium email marketing solutions with strong ratings, but they cater to different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers and monetization, while Moosend targets small businesses needing affordable automation and unlimited emails. Understanding their strengths helps you choose the right platform for your goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Web reader, referral program, ad network
comparison_table.tool_b: Landing pages, subscription forms, unlimited emails

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher interested in monetizing your audience through ads and sponsorships
You want a dedicated web reader and referral program to grow your subscriber base
You value community-focused features and plan to scale to premium tiers
choose_b_if: You need the lowest possible entry price and unlimited email sends on paid plans
You require landing pages and subscription forms integrated into your email platform
You're a small business or startup wanting powerful automation without high costs

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators wanting monetization features and audience growth tools, while Moosend is superior for small businesses needing affordable automation and unlimited emails. Both have identical 4.7 G2 and 4.4 Trustpilot ratings.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv offers a larger free tier (2,500 vs 1,000 subscribers), so the best choice depends on your subscriber count and budget.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically allow you to export your subscriber lists and contact data. Most email marketing platforms support standard CSV or API-based migrations, though you may need to manually recreate campaigns, automation workflows, and templates in your new platform.
